name: upkuajing
description: UpKuaJing (跨境魔方) business intelligence suite. Search customs trade records, find global companies and people, discover map merchants, send bulk emails/SMS, and validate contact information.

interface.shortDescription: Customs trade, company & people search, email/SMS, contact validation
interface.longDescription: UpKuaJing (跨境魔方) provides a complete business intelligence toolkit for import/export professionals. Search customs trade records, find global companies and people, discover map merchants, send bulk emails and SMS, and validate contact information — all with a single API key.
defaultPrompt: Find companies importing electronics from China using customs trade data
Search for soybean buyers in the US
Find company contacts with email addresses
